title: Rubatsiro uye Tsigiro
description: Isu tiri pano kuti tibatsire chero mibvunzo kana nyaya dzaungasangana nazvo paunenge uchishandisa yedu webhu application. Kunyangwe uchida rubatsiro kuti utange, iva nemubvunzo nezvechimwe chinhu, kana kuti uchida kumhan'ara tsikidzi, tiripo kuti tikubatsire.

contact.title: Bata Rutsigiro
contact.emailDesc: Isu tine chinangwa chekupindura kune ese maemail mukati meawa makumi maviri nemana.
contact.footer: Maita basa nekusarudza yedu web application. Takazvipira kuita kuti ruzivo rwako ruve rwakatsetseka uye runakidze sezvinobvira.

detailedFeatures.title: Detailed Feature Support
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Kupatsanurwa kweIzwi Kupinza uye Mavara-kune-Kutaura kugona pamudziyo wega wega.
